_comment: Gear field source whitelist. Some TODO_USER fields still need manual completion before the experiment runs end to end.

sources.name: Official Brand Site
sources.notes: Official source baseline. Capture stage now opens all current reel whitelist fields; write trust is still decided later.

sources.name: JapanTackle
sources.notes: Primary description-oriented whitelist source. Capture all open fields. Focus on model year, alias, body/gear material,用途、定位、卖点等描述层信息.

sources.name: TackleTour
sources.notes: Primary description-oriented whitelist source. Capture all open fields. Focus on review text里的技术、材质、用途、定位、卖点等描述信息.

sources.name: JDM Fishing
sources.notes: Primary description-oriented whitelist source. Capture all open fields. Focus on型号资料、用途、定位、卖点、补充结构信息.

sources.name: Avail
sources.notes: Deep-player data source. Capture all open fields. Focus on spool weight/material/axis, parts specs, compatibility and tuning-related evidence.

sources.name: Hedgehog Studio
sources.notes: Deep-player data source. Capture all open fields. Focus on spool specs, parts specs, compatibility, maintenance and tuning-related evidence.

sources.name: TackleTour Forum
sources.notes: Forum-style deep-player source. Capture all open fields for reel research, especially spool/gear/compatibility/long-term usage clues. Default use is as player/deep-field evidence or lead, not official-equivalent structured truth.
